ocpd_types.name: Miniature Circuit Breaker (MCB)
ocpd_types.notes: Domestic and light commercial. Thermal-magnetic trip. B-curve general lighting/sockets; C-curve motor/transformer inrush; D-curve large motors.

ocpd_types.name: Moulded Case Circuit Breaker (MCCB)
ocpd_types.notes: Commercial/industrial main and feeder protection. Adjustable thermal + magnetic + (some) ground-fault. Often the cascade upstream device.

ocpd_types.name: Air Circuit Breaker (ACB)
ocpd_types.notes: Large MSB main breaker. Drawout type. Programmable trip unit with multiple protection functions.

ocpd_types.name: Fuse (HRC / NH / cartridge)
ocpd_types.notes: Highest breaking capacity per unit cost. Common as upstream protection in cascade arrangements. UK service-head BS 1361/1362 fuse.

ocpd_types.name: Residual Current Breaker with Overload (RCBO)
ocpd_types.notes: Combines MCB + RCD in one module. Preferred for new IEC installations — per-circuit protection means single fault trips one circuit only.

ocpd_types.name: Residual Current Device (grouped)
ocpd_types.notes: Sits upstream of multiple MCBs. Cheaper than RCBO per circuit but single fault trips all downstream circuits in the group.
